reason: The statement applies because Elijah was forced to leave his home and go hide at the brook Cherith due to the drought he declared upon the land, which was beyond his control as it was according to the word of the LORD. Later, he was commanded to go to Zarephath by the word of the LORD and had to leave Cherith due to the drying up of the brook. Additionally, Obadiah had to go meet Ahab to deliver the message from Elijah, even though he was fearful of Ahab's reaction, showing that he was also forced to leave his usual place due to circumstances beyond his control.
